title: RBI Invites Comments on Draft Amendment Directions for One-Time Approval for Major Shareholding Acquisitions
description: <cite index="51-4">Draft Amendment Directions allow SEBI-registered mutual funds, IRDAI-registered insurers, and PFRDA-registered pension funds to obtain one-time RBI approval for subsequent acquisitions of major shareholding up to 10% of paid-up capital in banks, with comments due August 4, 2026</cite>.
